dev_focus: BOLT TASK C2508: Packeta SOAP shipment creation — core shipping integration needed for launch. `src/lib/shipping/` dir does NOT exist yet — start fresh. (1) `npm install soap`. (2) Create `src/lib/shipping/packeta.ts` — SOAP client for `https://www.zasilkovna.cz/api/soap`. Implement: `createPacket(order)` → packetId, `getPacketLabel(packetId)` → base64 PDF, `getPacketStatus(packetId)` → status, `cancelPacket(packetId)`. Env: `PACKETA_API_PASSWORD`. Required fields: apiPassword, number (orderId), name, surname, value (CZK decimal), weight (0.5 default kg for clothing), addressId (numeric string from widget point.id), eshop (sender label). Optional: email, phone, cod, currency='CZK'. (3) Add `packetId String?` to Order in schema.prisma + migrate dev + push to Turso shell. (4) Admin order detail: 'Vytvořit zásilku' button (Server Action), visible when shippingMethod='packeta' + shippingPointId set + no packetId. On success: store packetId, show 'Stáhnout štítek' PDF link. (5) Gotchas: weight=0 rejected, addressId MUST be numeric string. Run `npm run build` before claiming done.
notes: C2508 Lead — NotifyMeForm ✅ marked DONE in TODO (was incorrectly left open). Trace switched to until_next_bolt_commit — fires automatically once Bolt commits Packeta. schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
